physical_meaning.bumps: Vertical shock transfer and road-surface disturbance sensitivity.
physical_meaning.braking: Longitudinal deceleration load transfer and rider stabilization response.
physical_meaning.cornering: Lateral acceleration / lean-coupled dynamics in turns.
physical_meaning.sprinting: High-cadence rider-driven oscillation and power bursts.
physical_meaning.disagreement: Bike-rider coupling mismatch (relative motion and damping behaviour).
